services.washing.title: Washing
services.washing.desc: Scalp massage and deep cleanse with salon-grade products.
services.dyes.title: Dyes
services.dyes.desc: Full color application root to tip. Includes toner and conditioning rinse.
services.baby-highlight.title: Baby Highlight
services.baby-highlight.desc: Subtle face-framing highlights for a natural sun-kissed look.
services.color-touchup.title: Color Touch-Up
services.color-touchup.desc: Root retouch to blend regrowth with your existing color.
services.treatment.title: Treatment + Moisturizing
services.treatment.desc: Deep repair mask for dry or damaged hair. Leaves hair soft and resilient.
services.straightening.title: Straightening
services.straightening.desc: Keratin smoothing treatment for long-lasting frizz-free results.
services.haircut-barber.title: Haircut
services.haircut-barber.desc: Classic haircut tailored to your style and face shape.
services.perm.title: Perm
services.perm.desc: Long-lasting texture and shape for a fuller styled finish.
services.beard-trim.title: Beard Trim
services.beard-trim.desc: Shape and clean up your beard for a sharp, polished look.
services.eyebrow-shaping.title: Eyebrow Shaping
services.eyebrow-shaping.desc: Clean, precise shaping for a balanced and refined look.
services.haircut-beard-trim.title: Haircut + Beard Trim
services.haircut-beard-trim.desc: A full grooming session for a clean haircut and beard refresh.
services.haircut-beard-trim-eyebrow-shap: Complete grooming package with haircut, beard trim, and brow shaping.
